category_sources: source_facts.description says Versatile and fast Unicode/ASCII/ANSI graphics renderer; official Chafa site calls it terminal graphics.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is chafa; official homepage uses Chafa.
docs_sources: Official Chafa site hosts the project homepage, reference manual, and man pages.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; official Chafa download/development pages identify the GitHub repository as https://github.com/hpjansson/chafa.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies Unicode/ASCII/ANSI graphics rendering; source_facts.executables lists chafa CLI.
